programme.title: Benny & Joon, (2006, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Johnny Depp and Mary Stuart Masterson star in this quirky romantic Drama about two misfits who Comedye together as a result of an unusual poker game. Aidan Quinn and Julianne Moore co-star.

programme.title: Clueless, (1995, Romance)
programme.desc: A US West Coast teen lifestyle parody centered around Cher, a popular high school girl who spends her days playing match-maker, helping her friends with fashion choices, and looking for a boyfriend.

programme.title: Pretty In Pink, (1986, Romance)
programme.desc: She’s a high school girl from the wrong side of town. He’s the wealthy heartthrob who asks her to the prom. But as fast as their romance builds, it’s threatened by the painful reality of peer pressure.

programme.desc: Tripp, a 35 year-old who still lives with his parents. And who can blame him. It’s free, he’s got a great room, and mom does the laundry. Desperate to get him out of the house, his parents hire a gorgeous woman, Paula, to give him a little…push.

programme.title: How Stella Got Her Groove Back, (1998, Romance)
programme.desc: Stella's vacation to Jamaica takes a hot and steamy turn when she encounters a young islander.

programme.desc: Roman Polanski directs and Johnny Depp stars in this supernatural thriller about a rare-book dealer who discovers a demonic manuscript.

programme.title: Bug, (2007, Thriller)

programme.desc: While on location filming a horror movie, a group of college students finds themselves overrun by zombies, and ultimately end up capturing the epidemic on film.

programme.title: The Innkeepers, (2011, Horror)
programme.desc: After over one hundred years of service, The Yankee Pedlar Inn is shutting its doors for good. The last remaining employees - Claire and Luke - are determined to uncover proof of what many believe to be one of New England's most haunted hotels.

programme.title: Child's Play, (2019, Horror)
programme.desc: In this shocking re-imagining of the horror classic, single mother Karen (Aubrey Plaza) buys her son Andy (Gabriel Bateman) a seemingly innocent, AI-enhanced Buddi doll, unaware of its more sinister nature…and its true name…Chucky!

programme.title: Crawl, (2019, Horror)
programme.desc: As a hurricane tears through Florida, Haley rushes to find her father, who is injured and trapped in the crawl space of their home. With the storm intensifying and water levels rising, the pair face an even bigger threat lurking below the surface.

programme.title: Hereditary, (2018, Horror)
programme.desc: When the matriarch of the Graham family passes away, her daughter (Toni Collette) and grandchildren begin to unravel cryptic and increasingly terrifying secrets about their ancestry, trying to outrun the sinister fate they have inherited.

programme.title: Trust, (2025, Thriller)
programme.desc: A Hollywood star seeks refuge in an Airbnb after a scandal, only to find themselves at the mercy of seasoned criminals hunting a loot.

programme.title: 30 Days of Night, (2007, Horror)
programme.desc: Josh Hartnett (The Black Dahlia, Pearl Harbor) crosses over to the dark side in this bone-chilling adaptation of the cult-hit graphic novel, brought to the screen in all its demonic glory.

programme.title: 30 Days of Night: Dark Days, (2010, Horror)
programme.desc: Almost a year has passed since Barrow, Alaska’s population was decimated by vampires. Stella, mourning her husband’s murder, has been travelling the world trying to convince others that vampires exist.

programme.title: Fright Night, (1985, Horror)
programme.desc: Meet Jerry Dandridge. He's sweet, sexy, and he likes to sleep in late. You might think he's the perfect neighbor. But there's just one thing you should know. Jerry prefers his drinks warm, red and straight from the jugular! Rated: R

programme.title: The Dark Crystal, (1982, Science fiction)
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: Labyrinth, (1986, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: Fright Night, (1985, Horror)
programme.desc: Meet Jerry Dandridge. He's sweet, sexy, and he likes to sleep in late. You might think he's the perfect neighbor. But there's just one thing you should know. Jerry prefers his drinks warm, red and straight from the jugular! Rated: R

programme.title: The Beastmaster, (1982, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A sword-and-sorcery fantasy about a young man's search for revenge. Armed with supernatural powers, the handsome hero and his animal allies wage war against marauding forces.

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe, (1987, Action)
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: First Blood, (1982, Action)
programme.desc: A soft-spoken Vietnam vet drifts into a small town looking for no trouble, but finds it in the form of a psychotic local sheriff who finds pleasure in hating him for no reason.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: John Rambo is sent on assignment back to Southeast Asia to uncover evidence of still missing POWs, and ends up with his hands full when he comes up against Vietnamese soldiers still guarding the camps.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Ethan and team take on their most impossible mission yet, eradicating the Syndicate - an International rogue organization as highly skilled as they are, committed to destroying the IMF.

programme.title: Overdrive, (2017, Action)
programme.desc: Scott Eastwood stars in this action-adventure from the writers of 2 Fast 2 Furious and the director of Taken. When two legendary car thieves are caught stealing from a mafia boss, they are given a week to nab a vintage Ferrari, or risk losing everything.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol, (2011, Action)
programme.desc: Agent Ethan Hunt and his elite team go underground after a bombing implicates them as terrorists. While trying to clear their name, the team uncovers a plot to start a nuclear war.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Ethan and team take on their most impossible mission yet, eradicating the Syndicate - an International rogue organization as highly skilled as they are, committed to destroying the IMF.

programme.title: The Island, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: A man goes on the run after he discovers that he is actually a "harvested being", and is being kept along with others in a utopian facility.

programme.title: Project Almanac, (2015, Adventure)
programme.desc: When five teens discover a machine that can send them back in time, the possibilities seem endless. But by changing the past, they have threatened the future of our world. Can they undo the damage they have unleashed before it’s too late?

programme.title: Domestic Disturbance, (2001, Thriller)
programme.desc: In this “edge of your seat thriller,”* John Travolta stars as Frank Morrison, a man who discovers that his son’s new stepfather (Vince Vaughn) is not who he pretends to be.

programme.title: Mario Puzo's The Godfather Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone, (2020, Crime)
programme.desc: Director/screenwriter Francis Ford Coppola's definitive new edit and restoration of THE GODFATHER: PART III, with remastered picture and sound. Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.title: The Godfather, (1972, Crime)
programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America along with balancing the story of the Sicilian clan's ugly crime business in which they are engaged.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II, (1974, Crime)
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.desc: Director/screenwriter Francis Ford Coppola's definitive new edit and restoration of THE GODFATHER: PART III, with remastered picture and sound. Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.title: Bad Ass, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: A Vietnam veteran who becomes a local hero after saving a man from attackers on a city bus decides to take action when his best friend is murdered and the police show little interest in solving the crime.

programme.title: Bad Ass 2: Bad Asses, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo) teams up with grumpy old agoraphobic Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) to kick ass and clean up the streets of L.A.

programme.title: Pain & Gain, (2013, Crime)
programme.desc: When an ambitious group of personal trainers go after the American Dream, they get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong. Now, living large will take everything they've got in this unbelievable and outrageous true story.

programme.desc: A bank robber will stop at nothing to free his brother from prison, launching him into an odyssey through New York's dangerous criminal underworld.

programme.desc: After a confrontation with an unstable man at an intersection, a woman becomes the target of his rage.

programme.title: Pain & Gain, (2013, Crime)

programme.desc: A bank robber will stop at nothing to free his brother from prison, launching him into an odyssey through New York's dangerous criminal underworld.

programme.title: Unhinged, (2020, Action)
programme.desc: After a confrontation with an unstable man at an intersection, a woman becomes the target of his rage.

programme.title: Flight of the Intruder, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: The target: a missile depot in Hanoi. The plane: the A-6 Intruder, a low-altitude bomber with no defensive weapons. The risk: court-martial at the hands of Commander Camparelli...if they live to return.

programme.title: Forrest Gump, (1994, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.title: The Talented Mr. Ripley, (1999, Thriller)
programme.desc: Tom is a young man who believes it's better to be a fake somebody than a real nobody. Finally, A wealthy American shipbuilder hires Tom to travel to Italy to bring back his playboy son.

programme.title: The Professional, (1994, Action)
programme.desc: The mysterious Leon (Jean Reno) is New York's top hitman. When his next-door neighbors are murdered, Leon becomes the unwilling guardian of the family's sole survivor - 12-year-old Mathilda (Natalie Portman). Rating:R

programme.title: The Big Hit, (1998, Action)
programme.desc: Lou Diamond Phillips, Mark Wahlberg, Christina Applegate, Antonio Sabato Jr. and Lela Rochon star in this story of a hitman who kidnaps the teenage child of his boss.

programme.title: The Talented Mr. Ripley, (1999, Thriller)
programme.desc: Tom is a young man who believes it's better to be a fake somebody than a real nobody. Finally, A wealthy American shipbuilder hires Tom to travel to Italy to bring back his playboy son.

programme.title: Dirty Work, (1998, Comedy)
programme.desc: A spiteful loser finds his true calling when he opens a highly successful business specializing in revenge.

programme.title: Multiplicity, (1996, Screwball)
programme.desc: Michael Keaton and Andie MacDowell star in director Harold Ramis' brilliant comedy about a man who clones himself to save his marriage, and then almost loses his wife to himself! Keaton takes on four hilariously distinct roles.

programme.title: Clueless, (1995, Romance)
programme.desc: A US West Coast teen lifestyle parody centered around Cher, a popular high school girl who spends her days playing match-maker, helping her friends with fashion choices, and looking for a boyfriend.

programme.title: Can't Hardly Wait, (1998, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: It's graduation day at Huntington Hills High and that means one thing: Party! In one epic night, hearts will be broken, and new romances will blossom for six teens facing the rest of their lives - but not until the party ends!

programme.title: Serpico, (1973, Thriller)
programme.desc: A true-life drama of a cop whose revelations about the extent of bribery in the New York Police Department almost led to his death and resulted in the creation of the Knapp Commission.

programme.title: The Friends of Eddie Coyle, (1973, Thriller)
programme.desc: As a small time hood Eddie is about to go back to jail. In order to escape this fate he deals information on stolen guns to the feds. Simultaneously he is supplying arms to his bank robbing/kidnapping hoodlum chums.

programme.title: The Mechanic, (1972, Action)
programme.desc: In a role that powered him to stardom, Charles Bronson is an underworld executioner who turns murder into an art form in this ultimate crime chiller.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass, (1975, Western)
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: The Shootist, (1976, Action)
programme.desc: Afflicted with a terminal illness, John Bernard Books, the last of the legendary gunfighters, quietly returns to Carson City for medical attention from his old friend Dr. Hostetler.

programme.title: Escape from Alcatraz, (1979, Action)
programme.desc: Superstar Clint Eastwood and director Don Siegel re-team for their fifth film in this fascinating account of the only three men ever to escape from the infamous maximum security prison at Alcatraz.

programme.title: Serpico, (1973, Thriller)
programme.desc: A true-life drama of a cop whose revelations about the extent of bribery in the New York Police Department almost led to his death and resulted in the creation of the Knapp Commission.

programme.title: The Friends of Eddie Coyle, (1973, Thriller)
programme.desc: As a small time hood Eddie is about to go back to jail. In order to escape this fate he deals information on stolen guns to the feds. Simultaneously he is supplying arms to his bank robbing/kidnapping hoodlum chums.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Crestfallen
programme.desc: The back-and-forth battle between Trey and Yuma reaches its climactic conclusion! Can Yuma defeat Trey without Astral’s assistance or will Trey triumph, leaving Yuma one Heart Piece short of making it to the finals?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Party Panic
programme.desc: Yuma and his friends get all decked out for the event of the year - the World Duel Carnival Finals party! But when Yuma forgets his invite, can he find a way into the festivities, or will he be forced to hit the road and head home early?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Roller Duel!
programme.desc: It’s time for the World Duel Carnival Finals! But prepare for a world of twists and turns because the finalists will be dueling on a roller coaster! Can Yuma handle the ups and downs of the competition, or will he be sent for a loop?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Roller Coaster Rampage!
programme.desc: To assess Yuma’s dueling skills, Vetrix hires the Triad of Terror, a trio of cunning card sharks, to triple team him! Yuma better figure out a way to roll through this threesome before his dueling goes off the rails!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Test Your Luck!
programme.desc: The World Duel Carnival takes a dark turn as the finalists descend into the Dragon’s Den – a dark and dangerous duel track that will bring defeat for many a duelist!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The heat's on when Vetrix and Dextra duel in the jungle to decide who moves on to the World Duel Carnival semifinals!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Portal of Doom
programme.desc: Quinton takes a timeout during his duel against Kite to reveal the long-hidden mystery about Yuma’s father’s disappearance!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Cosmic Chaos
programme.desc: Quinton and Kite’s confrontation in the cosmos comes to a climactic conclusion!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Depths of Darkness
programme.desc: Shark finally faces off with his archenemy, Quattro! Will Shark get his long awaited revenge, or will he end up sleeping with the fishes?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Swimming with Sharks
programme.desc: It’s the cataclysmic conclusion between Shark and Quattro! If Shark doesn’t make a comeback from the depths of defeat, not only is he out of the tournament, but his quest for justice will go unserved!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Rockin’ and Rollin’
programme.desc: There’s chaos in the canyon when Yuma duels Nistro to see who will get the last spot in the World Duel Carnival semifinals! Can Yuma dodge defeat in the desert, or is Nistro destined to rock Yuma's world?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Doctor Visit
programme.desc: When Yuma’s deck goes missing, he and the gang set out to look for it! But when their search leads them to Heartland City, they end up finding much more than they bargained for!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Duel of Destiny: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma sets his sights on reeling in Shark in the first battle of the semifinals, but when his foe starts off dueling like a guppy, Yuma questions if he’s being baited! Does Yuma learn this far too late to escape a sinister Shark attack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Duel of Destiny: Part 2
programme.desc: This is it! Yuma’s jaw-dropping duel against Shark in the World Duel Carnival semifinals draws to a finish! Can Yuma rise above his razor-sharp rival, or will he be dragged down to the depths of defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Hart of the Matter
programme.desc: The mighty masked duelist Vetrix faces off against the Number Hunter Kite! Unfortunately for Kite, Vetrix springs a shocking surprise that makes dueling all but impossible!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Change of Hart
programme.desc: The explosive end to the battle between Kite and Vetrix roars to a finish! As the battle climaxes, Yuma sets out to free Kite’s brother Hart from Vetrix’s grasp, while Kite duels knowing full well that Hart’s safety hangs in the balance!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Sphere of Fear: Part 1
programme.desc: It all comes down to this! Yuma squares off against Vetrix in a battle that will determine the first ever World Duel Carnival Champion!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Sphere of Fear: Part 2
programme.desc: As the duel between Vetrix and Yuma races to its cataclysmic conclusion, Yuma stares down defeat and comes face-to-face with Vetrix’s shocking secret!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Sphere of Fear: Part 3
programme.desc: This is it! The earth-shattering ending of Yuma’s duel against Vetrix! Can Yuma rise above Vetrix’s unrelenting onslaught, or will he meet defeat and lose everything he holds dear – his soul, his Numbers and… Astral?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Countdown Begins
programme.desc: Yuma learns the details of Dr. Faker’s diabolical plan to destroy Astral World! Can Yuma figure out a way to stop Faker, or is the future of Astral World a thing of the past?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Trio’s Challenge: Part 1
programme.desc: Kite, Shark and Yuma join forces to take down Dr. Faker! Can this trio work together as a team and put an end to Faker’s fury, or will Faker and his deck prove to be too much of a challenge for these three fearless friends?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Trio’s Challenge: Part 2
programme.desc: With the fate of Astral World hanging in the balance, Yuma, Kite and Shark set their sights on stopping Dr. Faker, but before our three heroes can make their final move, Dr. Faker reveals the shocking reason behind his diabolical plan!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Trio’s Challenge: Part 3
programme.desc: When a mysterious being from Barian World appears, Yuma, Kite and Shark must work together and battle like never before if they want to save Hart, Astral World… and themselves!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Kite’s Plight: Part 1
programme.desc: The stage is set for the ultimate battle between Yuma and Kite, but just when Yuma’s about to high five the sky, Kite brings him crashing down to earth with a startling revelation!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Kite’s Plight: Part 2
programme.desc: The back and forth battle between Kite and Yuma comes to an exciting conclusion that leaves one of our duelists down for the count! Will Yuma’s dream of pulling out a victory become a reality, or is Kite going to turn this dream into a nightmare?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Attack of the Barians: Part 1
programme.desc: The Barian invasion begins! Yuma faces a dangerous new enemy who will go to any extreme to gain possession of Yuma’s Numbers in order to destroy Astral and his home!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Attack of the Barians: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma’s battle with a dangerous and powerful soldier of Barian World continues as he strives to keep Astral safe! Can Yuma beat this Barian enemy and his new Chaos Monster, or will Yuma end up losing what is most valuable to him… Astral?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Hard Knox
programme.desc: When pro duelist Devon Knox teaches a special class, Yuma gets taken to the school of hard knocks and learns a valuable lesson about the Barians he won’t soon forget!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Rule Duel
programme.desc: Ray nominates Yuma to run against Caswell for the position of Class Representative, but when the Ray Way takes a turn for the worse, Yuma finds himself facing off against a Student Council President who’s been corrupted by the Barians!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Adventures of Artimus Stanleyus
programme.desc: Shark gets hooked into a battle with the Barians when the President of the Comic Book Appreciation Club challenges him to a duel! Can Shark outdraw the competition, or will his Number and life points be erased?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Doom in Bloom
programme.desc: Shark’s sister Rio makes a big splash on her first day at school, but not all the attention she gets is good, especially when she catches the eye of a Barian botanist!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Rivals in the Ring
programme.desc: A new Barian threat arrives on the scene looking to take Yuma’s Numbers, but his plan gets tripped up when he falls head over heels for Tori!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Friendship Games
programme.desc: When Yuma’s buddies can’t stop bickering, it’s time for them to face-off in the Friendship Games, a sports dueling competition with surprises around every corner… including Barians!

programme.title: Bege and the Straw Hats are on the defensive as the full force of Mom's troops are brought down on them! As they retreat into a fortress, Germa 66 springs in to action! However, Bege has bad news for his allied forces.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: The Straw Hats and Germa 66 are cornered in Bege's stronghold - with the full force of the Big Mom Pirates pinning them down, it's only a matter of time before their defenses crack. The only way out seems to be to make a break for it.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Cutting the Father-Son Relationship! Sanji and Judge!

programme.title: The plan is executed to sneak the Straw Hats out of Big Mom's castle while hidden inside Bege! But the irascible Luffy can't resist getting in at least one punch against his foe! Meanwhile, the Tamate Box slips into the hands of some surprising agent!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Escape From the Tea Party! Luffy vs. Big Mom!

programme.title: The full might of the Big Mom Pirates proves too much for the Straw Hats and Germa 66. With no other options, they decide to turn and fight, even though it means their total annihilation!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Execution Begins! Luffy's Allied Forces Are Annihilated?!

programme.title: The Whole Cake Chateau starts crumbling while everyone is trying to escape for their lives! Luffy and the others get away and move on to the next stage of their escape, which involves some parting of ways.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Castle Collapses! The Straw Hat’s Great Escape Begins!

programme.title: The Straw Hats continue their mad dash to the Sunny! As Big Mom rages, her underlings decide to turn her Hunger Pang attacks against the Straw Hats! The Whole Cake Island scrambles to remake the cake to calm down Big Mom!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Spear of Elbaph! Onslaught! The Flying Big Mom!

programme.title: Kingbaum puts his life on the line ferrying the Straw Hats towards the Seducing Woods! But Big Mom's word trumps him in this terrifying forest, and soon enough she catches up! Meanwhile, Pudding puts her plan to rebuild the cake into action!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Pudding's Determination! Ablaze! The Seducing Woods!

programme.title: Zeus pursues the Straw Hats as Nami keeps him occupied. She has a shocking surprise in store for him, however, that might stop Big Mom in her tracks! Meanwhile, Brook and Chopper find the Shark Submerge in a strange situation.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Lightning Counterattack! Nami and Zeus the Thundercloud!

programme.title: Big Mom is relentless in her pursuit of the Straw Hats! Even being buried alive doesn't stop her! The plan to recreate the cake to stop her onslaught progresses, and Pudding's changeable heart confuses all those looking on!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Coincidental Reunion! Sanji and the Lovestruck Evil Pudding!

programme.title: Mama's onslaught continues as Pudding keeps battling the contradictory urges in her head - to kill or kiss Sanji! Meanwhile, Brook and Chopper are at Perospero's mercy - and are being reduced to sweetened versions of themselves!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Save the Sunny! Fighting Bravely! Chopper and Brook!

programme.title: Sandwiched between Big Mom and her advancing fleet, the only hope is the Sunny's Coup-de-Burst! But can the Straw Hats prepare it in time? Meanwhile, Pedro comes face to face with his past.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Before the Dawn! Pedro, the Captain of the Guardians!

programme.title: The last chance the Straw Hats have is the Coup de Burst! Pedro has made the ultimate sacrifice to give them this one chance to escape, but Big Mom's naval forces are closing in and poised to knock them out!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I'll Be Back! Luffy, Deadly Departure

programme.title: Nami and the others who escaped the Whole Cake Island by Pedro's sacrifice mourn over his death. Jimbei, however, keeps his calm, which makes Brook lose his temper. Meanwhile, Luffy confronts the formidable Sweet General Katakuri in the Mirroworld.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Man with a Bounty of Billion! The Strongest Sweet General, Katakuri!

programme.title: Pudding and Sanji arrive at Cacao Island and begin to remake the only cake that will calm Big Mom! But their fake nuptials get in the way as they bicker like a married couple! Meanwhile, Luffy has lost the battle of his life.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Hard Battle Starts! Luffy vs. Katakuri!

programme.title: Luffy keeps the forces out to destroy the Straw Hats at bay, however the crew needs to destroy all the mirrors - the final link that secure his safe return - on the ship in order to save themselves!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Green Room! An Invincible Helmsman, Jimbei!

programme.title: Nami and the others start breaking all the mirrors on the Sunny in order to keep their enemies out while she and Luffy discuss where to rendezvous – but little do they know the plan is overheard!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Threat of the Mole! Luffy’s Silent Fight!

programme.title: Both powerful combatants and strong users of Haki, Luffy and Katakuri are a dead match for each other. Every move is matched by their opponent! Elsewhere, the Big Mom Pirates square off against Germa!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The End of the Deadly Battle?! Katakuri's Awakening in Anger!

programme.title: Katakuri retires to his sanctuary to enjoy the merienda - a chance for him to savor the sweetness of his crew of chefs and replenish his Haki!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy discovers the secret to Katakuri's unearthly fighting ability, and just might have a solution for how to stop him! Meanwhile, at the Sweets Factory, Pudding receives a call from Brulee who has bad news for the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy Fights Back! The Invincible Katakuri's Weak Point!

programme.title: Luffy runs out of his Haki and has to buy some time - in the most peculiar way! Meanwhile the Big Mom Pirates mobilize their entire fleet to squelch the pirate threat, and the replacement cake nears completion!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Another Crisis! Gear Four vs. Unstoppable Donuts!

programme.title: When Chiffon comes under attack, Sanji must choose between defending her or revealing himself to his enemies! Meanwhile, Luffy uses Brulee as a human shield to avoid the wrath of Big Mom!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Rebellious Daughter, Chiffon! Sanji's Big Plan for Transporting the Cake!

programme.title: Bege arrives on the scene, seemingly willing to risk it all to bring down the Big Mom Pirates in a blaze of glory, but of course he has a trick up his sleeve! Meanwhile, Luffy keeps on the move to regain his Haki!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Man's Way of Life! Bege and Luffy's Determination as Captains!

programme.title: Sanji and Bege get together and get off of Cacao Island successfully, but their plan is in jeopardy as Oven begins to boil the sea itself! As Chiffon and the others who are on the ship are cornered, a surprising savior comes in to fight Oven!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Cake Sank?! Sanji and Bege's Getaway Battle!

programme.title: A vicious pincer attack bears down on the Straw Hats! Three fleets converge and try to squeeze the life from them! Daifuku himself take the lead! But Carrot draws on a deep power within and springs in to action under the light of the moon!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: The much anticipated wedding cake is on its way, but there is a debate at the last minute! Shouldn't this opportunity be used to slip poison into Big Mom's meal to topple the Emperor of the Sea?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Break Through! The Straw Hat's Mighty Sea Battle!

programme.title: Luffy, through sheer force of will, can almost use his Haki to battle Katakuri! Meanwhile, the Sunny catches fire while the Straw Hats try to kick out Big Mom, but that's when Jimbei steps up to the plate and takes a swing at her!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Finally, They Clash! The Emperor of the Sea vs. the Straw Hats!

programme.title: Luffy tries to enhance his Haki to foresee Katakuri's next move, but Katakuri's attacks keep pulling him down!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Dark King's Direct Precepts! The Battle Against Katakuri Turns Around!

programme.title: The cake is finally prepared and brought before Big Mom! With the end of her vicious rampage in sight, there is a chance for the Straw Hats to flee! Big Mom's crew is forced to decide who to attack! Meanwhile, Luffy grows ever closer to using his Haki!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Finally He Returns! Sanji, the Man Who'll Stop the Emperor of the Sea!

programme.title: Hiding her presence, Flampe shoots her blowgun at Luffy to support her dear brother Katakuri. Meanwhile, Oven launches a dastardly plan to fence Luffy in - by destroying every mirror on the island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Lurking in the Darkness! An Assassin Targeting Luffy!

programme.title: Katakuri notices his sister Flampe is sneakily providing poison needle back up in the shadows. Becoming enraged, he takes unexpected action that surprises everyone. Meanwhile, Smoothie increases her size and closes in on the Sunny.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: One Man's Determination! Katakuri's Deadly Big Fight!

programme.title: Luffy leans on his training to bring out the power of his Haki! Meanwhile, the children of Big Mom gather as a massive force, ready to smash Luffy and the Straw Hats. Their resentment at being embarrassed fuels their desire to get revenge!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Wake Up! The Color of Observation Able to Top the Strongest!

programme.title: Luffy and Katakuri are locked in a duel to end all duels! Their powers ensure that each blow could be the last! Luffy must rely on his training, let all his thoughts out, and keep pushing on! Meanwhile, Sanji is about to land at Cacao Island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Fist of Divine Speed! Another Gear Four Application Activated!

programme.title: Luffy's dramatic battle finally draws to a close! But even if he is able to pull out victory in the last moment, can he remember the key to escaping the Mirrorworld?!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Finally, It's Over! The Climax of the Intense Fight against Katakuri!

programme.title: Cloverfield, (2007, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: Universal Soldier, (1992, Action)
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: Shin Ultraman, (2023, Action)
programme.desc: A silver giant descends from the sky to rescue the planet. Dubbed Ultraman, this giant's identity and purpose are a mystery.

programme.title: Zathura: A Space Adventure, (2005, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In Columbia Pictures' heart-racing sci-fi adventure Zathura, two squabbling brothers are propelled into deepest, darkest space while playing a mysterious game they discovered in the basement of their old house.

programme.title: War of the Worlds, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: A contemporary retelling of H.G.Wells' classic, the sci-fi thriller reveals the extraordinary battle for the future of humankind through the eyes of one American family.

programme.title: The Blazing Sun, (1950, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry and pal Mike hunt bank robbers Al Bartlett and Trot Lucas. To throw off his pursuers, Bartlett kills his own twin brother and Lucas hoping that Gene and the Sheriff will believe him dead.

programme.title: The Sons of Katie Elder, (1965, Western)
programme.desc: The four rowdy sons of Katie Elder return home for her funeral and to avenge her death.

programme.title: Dakota, (1945, Western)

programme.title: Red River, (1948, Western)

programme.title: The Sons of Katie Elder, (1965, Western)
programme.desc: The four rowdy sons of Katie Elder return home for her funeral and to avenge her death.

programme.title: The Shootist, (1976, Action)

programme.title: Hang 'Em High, (1968, Action)
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.desc: In the course of one magical evening, Jonathan (John Cusack) and Sara (Kate Beckinsale) meet unexpectedly, but part ways, determining that fate will guide their future if they're meant to be together.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Ami find a clock that resembles Luna. That night, the clock emits a strange light that causes Usagi to become very impatient.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Disaster: Beware of the Clock of Confusion

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: People who take the bus near the Hikawa Shrine have started to go missing. Usagi and her friends decide to investigate.
programme.sub-title: The Cursed Bus: Enter Mars, the Guardian of Fire

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians go to the amusement park where visitors have gone missing. But Usagi is more focused on playing than finding the missing people.
programme.sub-title: Usagi vs. Rei: Nightmare in Dream Land

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rei goes off on a luxury cruise with Ami after winning tickets through the local lottery. Feeling left behind, Usagi sneaks aboard the ship.
programme.sub-title: I Want a Boyfriend: The Luxury Cruise Ship is a Trap

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Jadeite is given a warning by Queen Beryl, who can no longer tolerate the general’s failures. Jadeite challenges the Sailor Guardians to a showdown.
programme.sub-title: Girls Unite: The End of Jadeite

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rui is a talented tennis player but Naru has noticed a dark change in her. Worried about their classmate, Naru and Usagi go to investigate.
programme.sub-title: A New Enemy Appears: Nephrite's Evil Crest

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami brings Usagi and Rei to her favorite park. Rei decides to have a date with Mamoru at the park before it closes down.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Juban District is having a contest to decide who can design the best wedding dress. Usagi, Rei, and all the girls in town compete.
programme.sub-title: A Girl's Dream: Usagi Becomes a Bride

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A photographer named Kijin Shinokawa holds a modeling contest. All the girls who have entered begin disappearing after Shinokawa photographs them!
programme.sub-title: Usagi's a Model: The Flash of the Monster Camera

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Shingo’s friend Mika gives him a doll but Shingo unintentionally breaks the doll and hurts Mika’s feelings. Shingo decides to apologize.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi receives a love letter from Tuxedo Mask, stating that he’d like to meet her. She finds out that all the girls in town received the same letter.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Joy: A Love Letter from Tuxedo Mask

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls search for a vacation spot so they can focus on training. Instead, they settle on a mansion that has a very eerie service staff.
programme.sub-title: The Summer, the Beach, Youth and Ghosts

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami spots Nephrite and follows him to an animation studio that is making the Sailor V movie. Ami calls Usagi and Rei so they can investigate.
programme.sub-title: Protect the Children's Dreams: Friendship Through Anime

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Kingdom of Diamonds is hosting a party to reveal their treasure to the world. Both the Sailor Guardians and the Dark Kingdom crash the party.
programme.sub-title: Romance Under the Moon: Usagi's First Kiss

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Naru has fallen in love with Masato Sanjoin. Knowing that Sanjoin is really Nephrite, Usagi tries to convince Naru to give up on her feelings.
programme.sub-title: Wish upon a Star: Naru's First Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nephrite uncovers Sailor Moon’s identity as Usagi. His attempt to finish her off is cut short when he learns that Naru has been kidnapped by Zoisite.
programme.sub-title: Naru's Tears: Nephrite Dies for Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A new girl named Makoto Kino transfers to Usagi’s school, but her tough attitude seems to scare everyone away. Usagi quickly becomes friends with her.
programme.sub-title: Jupiter, the Powerful Girl in Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians grow in strength with its newest member Sailor Jupiter joining the team. Sailor Moon is appointed as team leader.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi learns that a transfer student named Ryo Urawa seems to have a crush on Ami, and tries to help him out.
programme.sub-title: Crushing on Ami: The Boy Who Can See the Future

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Naru attend an art exhibit by Yumemi Yumeno. Usagi and Mamoru are both asked by Yumemi to become models for her latest painting.
programme.sub-title: The Painting of Love: Usagi and Mamoru Get Closer

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Makoto discover Motoki has a girlfriend named Reika. His relationship is in jeopardy due to Reika’s chance to study abroad.
programme.sub-title: Total Chaos: The Messy Love Rectangle

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Grandpa Hino has become emotionally unstable, causing Rei to worry. The new apprentice Yuichiro tries to cheer her up.
programme.sub-title: Grandpa Loses Control: Rei in Danger

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and friends meet a girl who they believe holds the final Rainbow Crystal. But they realize it’s her pet cat that possesses the Rainbow Crystal!
programme.sub-title: Loved and Chased: Luna's Worst Day Ever

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Umino seems to have fallen in love with Naru. Naru only considers Umino a friend, so Usagi decides to play Cupid and urges them to go on a date.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: When the exploits of a Sailor Moon imposter become quite the sensation, the real Sailor Guardians step in to investigate.
programme.sub-title: Enter Venus, the Last Sailor Guardian

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Now that Sailor Venus has joined the team, all of the Sailor Guardians are finally together! Zoisite has discovered that Tuxedo Mask is Mamoru Chiba.
programme.sub-title: The Shining Silver Crystal: The Moon Princess Appears

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Tuxedo Mask is wounded while protecting Sailor Moon. The seven Rainbow Crystals gather and she is transformed into Serenity.
programme.sub-title: Returning Memories: Usagi and Mamoru's Past

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi is haunted by dreams of Tuxedo Mask, who has been abducted by the Dark Kingdom. Minako takes Usagi to a popular hair salon hoping it will help.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Confusion: Is Tuxedo Mask Evil?

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi decides to take the Princess Seminar course and the other Sailor Guardians join her. This is actually a trap set up by the Dark Kingdom.
programme.sub-title: Let's Become a Princess: Usagi's Bizarre Training

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends go to a ski resort to participate in the Moon Princess Contest, unaware that it’s Kunzite’s plan to eliminate the Moon Princess.
programme.sub-title: The Snow, the Mountains, Friendship and Monsters

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Figure-skating Janelyn & Misha offer to coach. Usagi and her friends decide to investigate. Makoto begins to receive personal lessons from Misha.
programme.sub-title: Paired with a Monster: Mako, the Ice Skating Queen

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi goes on a family vacation, where she is unexpectedly reunited with Mamoru. But Mamoru no longer remembers Usagi or even who he really is.
programme.sub-title: The Legendary Lake Yokai: The Bond of Usagi's Family

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Dark Kingdom is trying to revive the Seven Great Monsters. Sailor Mercury and Jupiter scramble to protect Ryo Urawa.
programme.sub-title: I Won't Run Away from Love Anymore: Ami vs. Mamoru

programme.title: Shutter Island, (2010, Thriller)

programme.title: Scar on the Praeter

programme.desc: 1970. Maria Lúcia questiona Felipe sobre documentos que poderiam ter salvado Virgínia da prisão; Alejandra pede a Carlota que se faça passar por enfermeira para cuidar de Trinidad; Adolfo retorna de sua aposentadoria. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor Secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Irene e Agustina se enfrentam; Agustina diz que Leonardo tem uma amante na frente das crianças; Alejandra pede a transferência de Maribel para evitar ser espionada. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Virginia confessa a sua irmã a existência dos documentos que comprovam sua inocência; Leo beija Maribel e Oriana os surpreende. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Runtime, (2026)
programme.desc: 2026. no info available Gêneros: no info available

programme.title: Um Acampamento do Barulho, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Encorajado pelo avô, Spence tenta aprender a lidar com seus medos e a fazer novos amigos em um acampamento cristão. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Três Ladrões e um Bebê, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O compulsivo jogador Slipper vê o sequestro do neto de um magnata como a salvação de suas dívidas. Quando, com seu senhorio e o oportunista Octopus, sequestram BB, sem saber, frustram os planos do crime organizado, que também está atrás da criança. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Garoto-Formiga 3, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O Garoto-Formiga entra em sua adolescência e pensa em se aposentar, mas muda de ideia quando seu arqui-inimigo é liberto da prisão. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Você Acredita?, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um pastor é questionado por um morador de rua sobre sua crença em Deus, e passa a usar essa pergunta com seus fiéis também. A partir daí, doze histórias diferentes se cruzam, cada uma com sua provação sobre até onde vai a fé em Deus. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Deus Não Está Morto - Uma Luz na Escuridão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um incêndio atinge a Igreja de Saint James, devastando a congregação e o Pastor Dave, e a universidade vizinha usa a tragédia para tentar despejar a congregação de seu campus. Dave recorre a seu irmão, um advogado ateu, para tentar reerguer a igreja. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Arn - O Cavaleiro Templário, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Arn foi criado para ser um monge e um bravo guerreiro. Ao deixar sua terra, em meio à guerra entre cristãos e muçulmanos, ele conhece Cecília e se apaixona, porém, Arn é enviado para lutar na Terra Santa como um cavaleiro templário. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Voo do Falcão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Durante o século XIII, um pequeno vilarejo luta por liberdade contra invasores mongóis. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: À Espera da Chuva, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após a morte misteriosa de seu pai, uma jornalista volta à sua cidade natal no interior. Ao chegar, descobre que o local está devastado pela seca e se tornou um lugar atormentado por gangues e os maus efeitos da pobreza extrema. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Segredos de Guerra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. No auge da Guerra Fria, um soldado problemático forma um triângulo amoroso proibido com um piloto de caça e sua companheira em uma base da força aérea soviética. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Sombras do Terror, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Adolescente que mora com o avô abusivo tenta proteger o melhor amigo contra os valentões da escola. Ao descobrir uma criatura assassina em seu galpão de ferramentas, ele e o colega bolam um plano de vingança. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Espião por Acaso, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Tim, um garoto de dez anos, se muda com sua família para um velho hotel situado na região costeira do país. Tim está sofrendo para se adaptar ao novo lar até que ele conhece Simon. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: De Volta ao Fundo do Mar, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O pequeno peixe Kevin é apanhado em uma rede e levado para um tanque em um restaurante de Nova York. Agora, ele deve encontrar uma maneira de voltar para casa e reencontrar sua família. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 1988. Surge um misterioso mascarado em cena, seu nome é Grande Máscara. Ele começa a derrotar campeões de diversas modalidades, um após o outro, tornando-se facilmente o novo ídolo das crianças. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E36

programme.title: 1988. No pacífico Vilarejo Fujimura, uma espécie de OVNI aparece e começa a atacar os moradores. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E37

programme.title: 1988. O primeiro grupo de imigrantes de Kaima finalmente chega à Terra. Porém, a tripulação morre por causa do clima inabitável para quem vem de Kaima. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E38

programme.title: 1988. Um homem misterioso aparece diante de Shigeru. Crianças são raptadas e transformadas em guerreiros por General Jark, sendo este mais um plano para eliminar RX. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E39

programme.title: 1988. Uma risada sinistra ecoa em um bloco de condomínios pacífico. Assim que Issamu adentra o condomínio fantasma, o Guerreiro Kaima Gainajagran surge diante dele e desafia RX. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E40

programme.title: 1985. Quatro cientistas estão no caminho da cidade tecnológica de Tsukuba em uma lancha pelo rio. Quando voltam estão com os cabelos brancos, além disso começam a agir violentamente. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E11

programme.title: 1985. A profecia da Bíblia Galáctica cita a existência de um empréstimo passado dourado que ajudou um herói a derrotar Satan Goss. Macgaren escraviza o povo de uma aldeia em busca do pássaro. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E12

programme.title: 1985. Chegando da Galáxia, os renegados espaciais "Quadridemos" com um único objetivo: destruir Jaspion. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E13

programme.title: 1985. O garoto Katsuya tira uma foto de um monstro no lago. Jaspion vai investigar o misterioso lago. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.sub-title: O perigo na lagoa dos noivos
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E14

programme.title: 1985. O Professor Nanbara captura em uma foto a imagem do empréstimo passo dourado. Jaspion investiga o que aconteceu, mas Macgaren e Iki estão à espera. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.sub-title: Sonho ou ilusão? A imagem dourada
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E15

programme.title: 1985. Kanoko e Kenta fogem da fazenda de Rod e Satie. Jaspion vai atrás das crianças. Enquanto isso, Zampa, Purima e Goru junto com os soldados de MacGaren vêm raptar pessoas. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo

programme.title: 1997. O avô de Stan está fazendo 102 e quer se matar, mas como não pode fazer isso sozinho, pede a ajuda de Stan. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T01E06

programme.title: 1997. Kenny é esmagado pela Estação Espacial Mir e se transforma em um zumbi que dá início a uma enorme epidemia. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T01E07

programme.title: 1997. Os rapazes encontram um objeto misterioso em uma escavação escolar e saem no jornal. Barbra Streisand aparece na cidade buscando o tal objeto, pois é a última peça necessária para que ela possa se transformar em um monstro japonês gigante. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T01E12

programme.title: 1998. Uma onda de crimes toma conta de South Park, galinhas são molestadas e Barbrady pede demissão. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T02E03

Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T02E14

programme.title: 1999. Vários habitantes de South Park estão ficando cada vez mais furiosos, e sem alguma razão aparente. Randy é o principal responsável para descobrir uma solução para este problema. Enquanto isso, Kyle tenta "conseguir uma ereção". Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E02

programme.title: 1999. Cartman, Kyle e Stan enganam Tweek e Craig para que eles lutem um contra o outro. Enquanto isso, um dos professores está sendo atormentado por uma recordação de sua falecida namorada, e Kenny conquista um homem rico na aula de cozinha. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E04

programme.title: 1999. A mãe de Cartman dá um presente para ajudá-lo a ganhar o concurso de soletrar. Trata-se de um "macaco da fonética". Neste concurso, os rapazes conhecem Marc e Rebecca, dois irmãos que não vão para a escola, pois estudam em suas casas. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E13

programme.title: 2000. Cartman acha que é muito maduro para sair com Stan, Kyle e Kenny, e decide buscar novos amigos na internet, mas termina se metendo em vários problemas com pedófilos. Enquanto isso, Kenny tenta evitar que seus pais tenham outro filho. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.sub-title: Cartman entra para a ASNAMB (Associação De Sósias Norte-Americanos Do Marlon Brando)

programme.title: 2001. Cartman encontra um carregamento cheio de fetos abortados após o tombamento de um caminhão em um barranco. programme.desc: Naruto: Corra!O Curry De Vida! - T01E157

programme.title: 2020. Naruto é escolhido para liderar Konohamaru, Moegi e Udon num treinamento de sobrevivência. O destino é o Grande Rosto de Pedra de Warudakumi no topo do Monte Takurami. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Sigam-Me ! O Grande Desafio Da Sobrevivência
programme.desc: Naruto: Sigam-Me ! O Grande Desafio Da Sobrevivência - T01E158

programme.title: 2020. Tsunade manda Naruto, Hinata, Kiba e Akamaru numa missão para capturar o ladrão Gosunkugi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Caçador De Recompensas Do Deserto!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Caçador De Recompensas Do Deserto! - T01E159

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e o os outros ajudam Sazanami, que está ferido. Sazanami conta que ele tinha sido um ferreiro de espadas numa aldeia tranquila, mas foi incriminado por um assassinato realizado por Gosunkugi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Caçar Ou Ser Caçado!?Decisão No Templo O.K..!
programme.desc: Naruto: Caçar Ou Ser Caçado!?Decisão No Templo O.K..! - T01E160

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Guy e Lee não estão presentes, dois impostores vestidos como eles entram na Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Aparecimento De Estranhos Visitantes - T01E161

programme.title: 2020. O País dos Pássaros está com problemas devido a um espectro conhecido como o Guerreiro Amaldiçoado, que muitos acreditam ser o fantasma do Senhor Owashi, o antigo senhor feudal que morreu de repente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Guerreiro Amaldiçoado - T01E162

programme.title: 2020. Moso, o conselheiro do falecido senhor feudal, e Komei, o estrategista chefe, estão em desacordo. Neji começa a achar que o Guerreiro Amaldiçoado faz parte de um plano… Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Plano Do Tático - T01E163

programme.title: 2020. Komei está controlando o Guerreiro Amaldiçoado. Moso impede as ambições de Komei. A equipe da Folha está incerta sobre os motivos dele. Neji não quer se envolver, mas Naruto se opõe. Gamakichi e Gamatatsu são escolhidos para investigar. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Tarde Demais Para Ajudar - T01E164

programme.title: 2020. Tenten e Neji, sem outra escolha, ouvem Kakashi. Ele sente que eles estão sendo perseguidos. Komei foi declarado um criminoso e condenado à morte. O Guerreiro Amaldiçoado aparece e captura Komei. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Morte De Naruto - T01E165

programme.title: 2020. Sagi jura punir Moso. Naruto se lembra de Sasuke quando vê Sagi. Nem palavras ou Naruto vão impedir que Sagi siga o caminho da vingança. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Quando O Tempo Para - T01E166

programme.title: 2020. Na mansão de Moso, uma batalha acontece entre os Ninjas Errantes e um ninja da Folha. Com a ajuda de Chishima, Naruto escapa do genjutsu de Moso. Moso revela ser o líder dos Ninjas Errantes, Hoki! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Quando As Garças Batem As Asas
programme.desc: Naruto: Quando As Garças Batem As Asas - T01E167

programme.title: 2020. Choji e Naruto querem muito o ramen especial de Ichiraku, mas descobrem que o restaurante está fechado. Teuchi revela que sua filha foi sequestrada por Ryonin, o Chefe Ninja, que está atrás de suas receitas secretas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Misture, Estique, Ferva! Cozinhe, Panela De Cobre, Cozinhe!
programme.desc: Naruto: Misture, Estique, Ferva! Cozinhe, Panela De Cobre, Cozinhe! - T01E168

programme.title: 2020. O Demônio do Oceano está lançando o caos no País do Mar. Anko lidera um time com Naruto, Ino e Shino. É revelado que Anko possui uma história inesperada no País do Mar. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Recordações : A Página Perdida - T01E169

programme.title: 2020. Incapaz de encontrar Naruto, Anko fala com os oficiais do País do Mar. O barco levando os fundos do governo que deviam proteger parte no dia seguinte! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Porta Fechada - T01E170

programme.title: 2020. Assim que acordou, Anko começa a lembrar da Ilha do Demônio, um lugar que ela visitou uma vez com seu sensei, Orochimaru. Anko revela a verdade por trás dos desaparecimentos e do segredo sobre o corpo de Isaribi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Infiltração : A Armadilha! - T01E171

programme.title: 2020. Amachi e sua gangue começam o ataque contra o navio do governo. Naruto e os outros escapam da Ilha do Demônio, mas o que eles encontram é a frota do País do Mar à beira da aniquilação. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Desespero : Um Coração Partido! - T01E172

programme.title: 2020. Os ninjas da Folha e Amachi se enfrentam no mar. Com a ajuda de Naruto, Amachi é derrotado, mas um monstro aparece. Naruto invoca Gamabunta para derrotá-lo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Batalha No Mar : O Poder Liberado!
programme.desc: Naruto: Batalha No Mar : O Poder Liberado! - T01E173

programme.title: 2020. Kunijiro visita Tsunade e escolhe Naruto para guiar seu garoto por um dia na vida de um ninja! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Impossível!Arte Ninja: Jutsu Estilo Dinheiro! - T01E174

programme.title: 2020. Agari Kaisen, um amigo de Tsunade, pede a Naruto, Kiba, e Hinata que procurem um tesouro escondido. Achando ser uma tarefa fácil por terem um mapa, Tsunade ameaça mandá-los de volta à Academia, se falharem. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Caça Ao Tesouro Começa! - T01E175

programme.title: 2020. Depois de escaparem da caverna, Naruto e os outros vão atrás da clã Kedouin para impedir seu plano, mas a Aldeia Oculta da Folha já está sendo atacada. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Corra! Esquive-Se Em Zigue-Zague! Caçar Ou Ser Caçado!
programme.desc: Naruto: Corra! Esquive-Se Em Zigue-Zague! Caçar Ou Ser Caçado! - T01E176

programme.title: 2020. Naruto descobre que Jiraiya está aprontando algo. Jiraiya diz que está ocupado preparando seu manuscrito antes do prazo final. Naruto, impaciente e irritado, escreve seu próprio manuscrito para Jiraiya! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Por Favor, Senhor Carteiro! - T01E177

programme.title: 2020. A Aldeia Oculta nas Estrelas pede à Aldeia Oculta da Folha para proteger uma estrela. A estrela, na verdade, é um meteorito que caiu 200 anos atrás, e dizem que ela possui poderes misteriosos. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Encontro! Um Menino Com Nome De Estrela
programme.desc: Naruto: Encontro! Um Menino Com Nome De Estrela - T01E178

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e os outros investigam o paradeiro da estrela roubada. O time suspeita alguém da Aldeia Oculta nas Estrelas porque o ninja que roubou a estrela usou a arte ninja da aldeia, Kujaku. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Inesquecível Canção De Ninar - T01E179

programme.title: 2020. Akahoshi, o ninja mascarado que sequestrou Sumaru, pretende usar Sumaru para chamar o ninja misterioso que roubou a estrela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Jutsu Oculto! O Preço Da Arte Ninja: Kujaku
programme.desc: Naruto: Jutsu Oculto! O Preço Da Arte Ninja: Kujaku - T01E180

programme.title: 2020. O ninja mascarado e Naruto caem nas profundezas do vale. Ao tratar as feridas de Naruto, o ninja mascarado conta o motivo de ter roubado a estrela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Hoshikage : A Verdade Enterrada - T01E181

programme.title: 2020. O corpo de Natsuhi é afetado pelos efeitos da estrela. Ela controla a estrela e confronta Akahoshi desesperadamente, mas Sumaru é levado como refém. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Reunião : O Tempo Restante - T01E182

programme.title: 2020. Sumaru sente a morte da mãe e foge furioso. Naruto é incapaz de pará-lo. Para salvar Sumaru, Hokuto e Mizura arriscam suas vidas para revelar a verdade por trás do treinamento com a estrela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Estrela Radiante - T01E183

programme.title: 2020. Akamaru é ferido por um shinobi rival de outra nação. O shinobi usou uma habilidade de luta que espalha bactéria pelo corpo do oponente, infectando as capacidades mentais da vítima. Isso faz com que Akamura entre numa fúria incontrolável. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Longo Dia De Kiba - T01E184

programme.title: 2020. Uma misteriosa criatura se anexa a Naruto durante um treinamento na floresta. Tsunade começa a achar que é a criatura lendária chamada Onbaa. Gêneros: Anime

programme.desc: Naruto: A Lenda Da Aldeia Da Folha: O Onbaa! - T01E185

programme.desc: Naruto: O Risonho Shino - T01E186

programme.sub-title: Aberto Para Negócios! O Serviço De Mudanças Da Folha
programme.desc: Naruto: Aberto Para Negócios! O Serviço De Mudanças Da Folha - T01E187

programme.title: 2020. Ao interrogar Yurinoshin e Shun, a equipe da Folha aprende sobre a verdadeira identidade de Shun. Ela é a princesa Haruna, a única filha do senhor feudal do País dos Vegetais. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Mistério Dos Mercadores Atingidos - T01E188

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e os outros são atacados por Ruiga, o primeiro ninja maligno, que consegue tirar água da terra para usar como armas. Naruto logo descobre um jeito de ter a vantagem na batalha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Um Ilimitado Abastecimento De Ferramentas Ninja!
programme.desc: Naruto: Um Ilimitado Abastecimento De Ferramentas Ninja! - T01E189

programme.desc: Naruto: A Misteriosa Maldição Do Castelo Mal-Assombrado - T01E194

programme.desc: Naruto: Confronto De Sangue-Quente: Aluno Contra Sensei - T01E196

programme.desc: Naruto: O Anbu Desiste? A Lembrança De Naruto - T01E198

programme.desc: Naruto: O Poderoso Ajudante - T01E200

programme.desc: Naruto: Múltiplas Armadilhas! Contagem Regressiva Para A Destruição - T01E201

programme.desc: Naruto: As Cinco Super Batalhas Ninja! - T01E202

programme.title: 2020. Naruto encontra uma jovem menina chamada Yakumo desenhando algo estranho. Os Caçadores Especiais ANBU e os médicos ninja chegam para levá-la. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Decisão De Kurenai: A Equipe Oito Está Dispensada
programme.desc: Naruto: A Decisão De Kurenai: A Equipe Oito Está Dispensada - T01E203

programme.desc: Naruto: O Poder Selado De Yakumo - T01E204

programme.desc: Naruto: A Missão Ultra Secreta De Kurenai: A Promessa Ao Terceiro Hokage - T01E205

programme.desc: Naruto: Genjutsu Ou Realidade? - T01E206

programme.desc: Naruto: A Habilidade Supostamente Selada - T01E207

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Paraíso na Água - T11E230
programme.desc: 2011. Os Clones das Sombras de Naruto se voltam contra ele por se sentirem maltratados e sobrecarregados. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tati Keplmair, Elcio Sodre, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Paraíso na Água - T11E231
programme.desc: 2011. Shikamaru começa a sentir a pressão de se responsabilizar pela vida dos seus amigos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tati Keplmair, Elcio Sodre, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Paraíso na Água - T11E232

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Disfarce de Kawaki - T18E266

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Disfarce de Kawaki - T18E268

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Disfarce de Kawaki - T18E272

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E237

Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.desc: 2022. Há um assassinato a bordo do navio que deveria transportar as pessoas resgatadas da Ilha Dotou, e Kyoho é o principal suspeito com base nas evidências. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E239
programme.sub-title: O Garoto da Ilha dos Construtores de Navios
programme.desc: 2022. O navio que transportava Boruto, seus amigos e o povo da Ilha Dotou está morto na água. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E240
programme.desc: 2022. Boruto se junta a Ikada enquanto ele navega para uma fábrica onde eles podem obter um componente necessário para o reparo de navios. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E241
programme.desc: 2022. Agora que seu navio foi consertado, Boruto e os outros logo deixarão a ilha dos construtores navais. Ikada, agora amigo de Boruto, promete realizar seu sonho e fazer-lhe uma visita. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E242
programme.desc: 2022. Em retaliação contra Boruto e seus amigos por destruir a fortaleza móvel de Tenma, os piratas desembarcam na Ilha dos Construtores Navais. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E243
programme.desc: 2022. Uma mensagem codificada que se acredita ter sido deixada por Funamushi revela que a Hidden Mist Village está em perigo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E244

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E245
programme.desc: 2022. O esquadrão principal liderado por Funamushi está se aproximando da aldeia. Boruto e os outros ficam parados, com a intenção de usar armadilhas para desacelerar o inimigo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E246
programme.desc: 2022. Apesar de serem atraídos para uma batalha difícil, Boruto e os outros conseguem forçar o esquadrão de Funamushi a recuar, mas isso vem com um preço alto. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E247
programme.desc: 2022. Apesar da presença de crianças, Funamushi luta ferozmente sem levar em consideração os danos que causa. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E248
programme.desc: 2022. Denki e Iwabe protegem as crianças da aldeia que os acompanham para buscar comida. Eles conseguem escapar, mas são capturados por Funamushi e seu esquadrão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E249
programme.desc: 2022. Boruto e seus amigos conseguem triunfar sobre Funamushi, mas não conseguem saborear a vitória. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E250
programme.desc: 2022. Ikada volta para casa depois de saber que sua irmã foi gravemente ferida em batalha. Ele passa os próximos dias cuidando dela e é visitado pelo filho de Funamushi, Kobuna. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E251
programme.desc: 2022. Araumi está furioso com a perda de familiares e muitos de seus subordinados durante as batalhas até agora. Ele oficialmente declara guerra contra o País da Água. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E252
programme.desc: 2022. Sarada, Mitsuki e Boruto decidem se encontrar com o Mizukage. programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E253
programme.desc: 2022. Boruto, Sarada e Mitsuki vão se encontrar com Ikada, que agora se aliou contra o País da Água. Boruto tenta falar com Ikada como amigo para fazê-lo parar de lutar. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: A guerra dos Funato - T17E254
